Frontend Engineer Resume —
VAMSI SHESAMSETTI
Frontend Developer · React · Tailwind CSS · Custom Hooks · Responsive UI · Vercel
Delray Beach, FL | +1 (728) 880-9390 | shesamsettivamsi11@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/vamsishesamsetti | github.com/vamsishesamsetti
Professional Summary

Frontend developer with an M.S. in Computer Science from Florida Atlantic University (GPA 3.9/4.0, May 2026) and three production-deployed React applications. Expert in building complex UI: Kanban boards, analytics dashboards with live charts, custom hooks for data fetching, Context API for global state, protected routing, and mobile-first responsive layouts with Tailwind CSS. All projects deployed live on Vercel with 4 cloud certifications validating the full engineering stack.

Technical Skills
Frontend:React.js 19 (Vite), Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, React Router v7, Context API, Custom Hooks, Responsive Design
React Patterns:Custom hooks, compound components, protected routes, modal management, real-time state updates, localStorage persistence
UI/UX:Kanban boards, analytics dashboards, skeleton loaders, status charts, mobile-first layouts, error boundaries
API Integration:REST APIs, JWT-authenticated requests, Cloudinary file upload, retry-based error handling
Backend (familiar):Node.js, Express, Python Flask, PostgreSQL, JWT Auth — built full-stack apps end-to-end
Cloud & Tools:Vercel, Git, GitHub Actions, Postman, VS Code
Languages:JavaScript (ES2022+), Python, Java, C++
Projects
CricketPulse – Live Score & Analytics App
2026
React 19 (Vite), Tailwind CSS, CricAPI, React Router v7, Custom Hooks, Vercel
live-cricket-score-app.vercel.app · github.com/vamsishesamsetti/live-cricket-score-app
  • Engineered a custom hook (useMatchDetails) encapsulating API fetching, error handling, and retry logic — zero data-fetching code in components.
  • Built a utility-based match classification system separating live/upcoming/finished logic, enabling clean filter UI with zero prop drilling.
  • Implemented persistent pinned matches with localStorage (survives page reload), skeleton loaders during fetch, and retry-based error UI with user-friendly feedback.
  • Fully responsive mobile-first layout using Tailwind CSS; deployed on Vercel with API keys secured via environment variables.
Job Tracker SaaS – React Dashboard
2026
React (Vite), Tailwind CSS, Context API, React Router, Cloudinary, Vercel
job-tracker-saas.vercel.app · github.com/vamsishesamsetti/job-tracker-saas
  • Built a Kanban board with drag-to-update status columns (Applied → Interview → Offer → Rejected), real-time UI updates without page refresh.
  • Designed analytics dashboard with StatusChart (pie/bar visualization) and StatCard components for at-a-glance application pipeline metrics.
  • Managed global auth state with Context API; implemented protected routes, login/register pages, and JWT token storage with automatic redirect.
  • Resume upload/preview modal with Cloudinary file integration; responsive sidebar + navbar layout using Tailwind CSS.
SmartBid – Auction Platform Frontend Integration
2026
Python / Flask (REST API) | Full API design documented in Postman
github.com/vamsishesamsetti/smartbid-auction
  • Designed clean REST API (create, list, bid, result) with JWT authentication, enabling straightforward frontend integration for any client.
  • Built with Flask-Cors for cross-origin support; API documented in Postman collection with full request/response examples.
